summary: The Optimism txpool transaction divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in the interop deadline accessor; no pooled transaction behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 229: M	crates/optimism/txpool/src/transaction.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return Some(interop)` to `return Some(interop);`.
No relaxed atomic load, interop sentinel comparison, or deadline result behavior changed.
